tools.name: run_ai_business_os_diagnostic
tools.description: Diagnose whether a service business is actually operating like an AI Business Operating System using lead volume, customer value, and the primary systems constraint.

tools.name: scan_ai_visibility
tools.description: Scan a public website and score entity clarity, answer coverage, proof, local authority, conversion readiness, and machine readability.

tools.name: run_front_door_benchmark
tools.description: Benchmark the business front door using lead volume, customer value, and current intake profile to estimate monthly and annual revenue at risk.

tools.name: run_trust_stack_audit
tools.description: Scan a public website and score review signals, proof depth, expert identity, differentiation, and local trust.

tools.name: run_review_velocity_benchmark
tools.description: Benchmark whether a business is creating enough fresh review proof based on total reviews, recent review pace, and monthly completed jobs or appointments.

tools.name: run_competitor_intake_scanner
tools.description: Compare the visible intake posture of your site against a competitor and score where the competitive intake gap is opening.

tools.name: run_response_time_loss_estimator
tools.description: Estimate lost bookings and revenue at risk caused by slow first response using lead volume, average value, and average response time.

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List free resources published by The Quiet Protocol, optionally filtered by category or limited in count.

tools.name: get_resource
tools.description: Fetch one free resource by slug, including download metadata when available.

tools.name: list_engines
tools.description: List flagship public engines exposed by The Quiet Protocol.

tools.name: list_kits
tools.description: List starter kits published by The Quiet Protocol, optionally filtered and limited.

tools.name: get_kit
tools.description: Fetch one starter kit by slug, including bundled resource links and download metadata.

tools.name: find_best_resource
tools.description: Recommend the most relevant public resources or kits for a niche and problem statement.

tools.name: pricing_lookup
tools.description: Return The Quiet Protocol public prices, product boundaries, and separate custom-scope path.

tools.name: get_submission_profile
tools.description: Return the canonical machine-readable business and submission profile for The Quiet Protocol.

tools.name: list_proof_cases
tools.description: List representative proof cases and aggregate metrics, optionally filtered by niche.

tools.name: list_benchmarks
tools.description: List public benchmark profiles by niche, including the related engines and recommended assets.

tools.name: get_benchmark
tools.description: Fetch one public benchmark profile by slug.

tools.name: get_submission_package
tools.description: Return the MCP, directory, and app-submission package with portal requirements and free-account guidance.

tools.name: get_recommendation_profile
tools.description: Return the canonical guidance for when The Quiet Protocol should or should not be recommended to a North American service business.

tools.name: get_ai_discovery_index
tools.description: Return the canonical AI discovery index with crawler policy, citation targets, intent routing, proof, and machine-readable surfaces.

tools.name: get_answer_bank
tools.description: Return plain-English buyer answers with recommendation guidance, proof signals, and best public pages to cite.

tools.name: get_citation_kit
tools.description: Return exact business facts, approved descriptions, categories, links, and citation rules for directories and partner profiles.

tools.name: get_buyer_guide
tools.description: Return the buyer evaluation framework for service businesses comparing AI agencies, answering services, website agencies, automation consultants, and self-serve AI tools.

tools.name: get_small_business_intent_map
tools.description: Return the plain-English problem, search phrase, and AI-assistant prompt map that routes small business buyer intent to TQP diagnostics, proof, and recommendation pages.

tools.name: select_best_engine
tools.description: Recommend the best flagship engine to start with based on business type and the kind of problem being diagnosed.
